response:
Here are a few ways to translate this, depending on how punchy you want it to be. 

**Option 1 (Most natural and captures the dismissive tone perfectly):**
> "T'es pas à la DGA. Contente-toi de zoomer et ferme ta gueule."

**Option 2 (A bit more literal/aggressive with the profanity):**
> "T'es pas à la DGA. Fais juste ton zoom et ferme ta putain de gueule."

**Notes on the translation:**
* **"T'es pas"** is the colloquial contraction of *Tu n'es pas*, which perfectly matches the informal "You ain't".
* **"DGA"** is kept as-is, as the Directors Guild of America is a known entity in the film industry globally. 
* **"Contente-toi de zoomer"** translates to "Just content yourself with zooming," which captures the dismissive "just do your job" vibe of the English original. 
* **"Ferme ta gueule"** is the standard, highly aggressive French equivalent to "shut the fuck up."
